mapper.sql: SELECT id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, temperature_zone, quality_zone, employee_code, employee_name, dept_code, dept_name_full_path, company, is_enabled, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM sys_warehouse WHERE isdeleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_warehouse( warehouse_code, warehouse_name, temperature_zone, quality_zone, employee_code, employee_name, dept_code, dept_name_full_path, company, is_enabled, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{warehouseCode}, #{warehouseName}, #{temperatureZone}, #{qualityZone}, #{employeeCode}, #{employeeName}, #{deptCode}, #{deptNameFullPath}, #{company}, #{isEnabled}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_warehouse
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, temperature_zone = #{temperatureZone}, quality_zone = #{qualityZone}, employee_code = #{employeeCode}, employee_name = #{employeeName}, dept_code = #{deptCode}, dept_name_full_path = #{deptNameFullPath}, company = #{company}, is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND isdeleted = 0
UPDATE sys_warehouse SET isdeleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND isdeleted = 0
UPDATE sys_warehouse SET is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND isdeleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT company FROM sys_warehouse WHERE isdeleted = 0 AND company IS NOT NULL AND company != '' ORDER BY company
